summary: Backend 13/13 pytest tests passed (auth, validate, create, list isolation, get, export CSV, manual-link, compare, debtors, audit, logout, delete). Frontend landing/signup/dashboard/compare/debtors/audit render with correct EB brand. Found CRITICAL frontend routing bug: /allocations/new resolves to AllocationDetail showing 'Run not found' instead of the 4-step wizard.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigating to /allocations/new shows 'Run not found' toast and loads AllocationDetail. The dynamic /allocations/:id route is matching before /allocations/new, so the New Allocation wizard is unreachable from sidebar 'New Allocation' link / 'New allocation' button.

integration_issues.issue: Wizard cannot be opened via /allocations/new route; users cannot create runs through the UI (backend POST /api/allocations works fine via API). Sample-data button never rendered.

action_items: Fix React route ordering in /app/frontend/src/App.js — declare <Route path='/allocations/new'> BEFORE <Route path='/allocations/:id'>, or use a non-conflicting path like /new-allocation. Currently 'new' is interpreted as run_id by AllocationDetail, causing API GET /api/allocations/new -> 404 'Run not found'.

After fix, retest full wizard flow (sample data -> validate -> run), AllocationDetail tabs, Manual Link dialog, Compare matrix render with 2 runs, Debtor threshold flagged banner, Audit filter by run id.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 786 lines — acceptable but starting to grow; consider splitting auth/allocations/reports into routers.
set_auth_cookies uses secure=False — fine for preview but must be True in production (behind HTTPS).
No refresh-token endpoint exists despite refresh_token cookie being issued; access token (12h) expiry will force re-login.
validate_csvs warnings block create unless proceed_with_warnings=True — UX should clearly show this in wizard.
Debtor 'flagged' only true when threshold>0; threshold=0 yields all flagged=false (intended but document).
test_credentials: admin@ebbusiness.com / Admin@2026! (verified login). Auto-created test users via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Two ephemeral users created per test run; one allocation run created and deleted by tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid (all CRUD + matching + isolation + audit verified by pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py). Focus next iteration on frontend wizard once route ordering is fixed — verify 4 steps, sample data autofill, header auto-detect, validate response render, run submit; then AllocationDetail tabs (Full/Partial/Unmatched Bank/Unmatched Invoice/Audit Log), Export CSV download, Manual Link dialog from Unmatched tabs; Compare 2-run matrix badges; Debtor threshold flagged banner + expand rows + CSV export; Audit page run_id filter.
rca of the issue: Frontend route /allocations/new is consumed by the dynamic route /allocations/:id (in React Router v6, both static and dynamic siblings should coexist with static taking precedence, but if /allocations/:id is declared FIRST or the wizard route is missing/misnamed, /new is treated as an id). Fix: ensure App.js declares the static '/allocations/new' Route before '/allocations/:id', or rename the wizard route. Symptom reproduced live: red toast 'Run not found' and AllocationDetail loading skeleton at /allocations/new.
